shutdownPeriods.comments:
The facility process includes grain receiving, still house, steam plant, dry house, tank house, ware house and bottling. The 2022 shut down included grain receiving, still house, steam plant and dry house.
 
2023 Shut down is planned for July 7 - 28

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment:
Incident impacting the Dryhouse furnace dryers (2) - reduced operation to 7 months (offline mid-January to mid-May).

Boiler 7 was decommissioned and removed from site - operating January to mid-May (stack height exceeds 25 m). MIURA boilers commissioned mid-May and currently operating.

comments.comment: Facility incident affecting the drying furnaces, reduced operation to 7 months - with the two furnaces off-line for 5 months, this resulted in the reduction of VOC's

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment:
May, July,  August and 1/2 September - distillation and dryhouse operations (temporarily) transitioned from 7 day operation to 5 day. 

MIURA Low NOx boilers (8) - replaced the previous boiler (#7). Maximum Emission Rate (g/s) for NOx, each MIURA boiler 3.571 E-2. Compared to Boiler 7 at NOx emission of 0.8632
